title: Escalion
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name=Escalion |homeworld=[[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=Dark |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Pale |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Yedagon Confederacy]]{{CSWECite|I|240|Escalion}} *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You want me to fly with your forces against Cartann.''"
"''No. To lead them. All of them.|Wedge Antilles to Perator Escalion|}} '''Escalion''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Adumari]] and the [[perator]] of the [[Yedagon Confederacy]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. He provided sanctuary to [[Red Flight]], [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]], [[Cheriss ke Hanadi]] and [[Hallis Saper]], who at the time were fleeing from the nation of [[Cartann]]. Escalion offered [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] command of the united forces of all nations opposed to Cartann, an offer Antilles accepted. After emerging victorious from the [[Adumari Civil War]], Escalion and the rulers of the other nations formed the [[Adumari Union]]. ==Appearances== *''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Adumari]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Monarchs]]
